chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 59 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of MA-227/19. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2019. Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G = It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that learned District Judge, Mirpurkhas while making disposal of Succession Application No.114 of 2012 titled “Mst.Nasreen vs Muhammad Usman and others” has passed adverse remarks against the petitioner without proper enquiry. By contending so, he sought for expunction of those remarks against the petitioner. Learned A.A.G has recorded no objection, if the remarks passed against the petitioner are expunged. In view of above, the remarks passed against the petitioner are expunged. The instant petition is disposed of accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
